C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI review confirmed type_shape_definition coverage for primitives, stable IDs, enum/reference registries, ownership metadata, and all six entity field_shapes. No P0/P1 findings; four P3 notes.

findings.title: Identifier primitive type 'uuid' diverges from identifier_policy stable_prefixed_id format
findings.details: identifier_policy examples are prefixed ULID-style strings, while identifier field_shapes use primitive uuid. This is a contract wording mismatch, not a field coverage failure.
findings.recommendation: Clarify uuid as a logical opaque identifier or introduce a stable_prefixed_id primitive before executable model implementation.

findings.title: Lifecycle status enum registries are declared but not bound to any field_shape
findings.details: Some status enum registries are defined for lifecycle declarations but not consumed by field_shapes because status is not an M01 required field for those entities.
findings.recommendation: At the implementation anchor, add explicit status field_shapes or record status as a system-managed lifecycle field.

findings.title: HumanApproval.decision enum blends lifecycle states with decision outcomes
findings.details: HumanApproval.decision mixes requested/expired/revoked lifecycle states with approved/rejected outcomes. This was already adjudicated as a future HumanApproval implementation concern.
findings.recommendation: Split HumanApproval lifecycle from decision outcome before executable HumanApproval behavior ships.

findings.title: Stale line reference in previous HumanApproval.decision finding
findings.details: The previous artifact cited line 707 for HumanApproval.decision; current enum registry is around lines 738-747.
findings.recommendation: Refresh line anchors in regenerated review evidence.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI review completed. No P0/P1 findings; P2 findings, if any, are absent; P3 notes are recorded in adjudication and do not block this subphase.

review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json
